name: canshare-who-mature-tnk-cell-other-histology
title: NZ WHO haematolymphoid mature T-cell AND/OR natural killer cell neoplasm other histology
description: Histologies used for mature T-cell AND/OR natural killer cell neoplasm not peripheral T cell or extranodal NK/T cell or primary T cell cutaneous lymphoma (WHO Classification of Tumours, Haematolymphoid Tumours) or an 'Other' value.
